ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., City of Pomona, Unincorporated) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., city, county, state) */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) for mapping purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the precinct is located */,
  "precinct_type" TEXT /* Type of precinct (e.g., voting, absentee) */,
  "polling_place_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the polling place assigned to the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_types" (
  "election_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election type */,
  "election_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the election type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election type */,
  "election_category" TEXT /* Category of the election (e.g., primary, general) */,
  "election_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the election (e.g., annual, biennial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_methods" (
  "voting_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting method */,
  "voting_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the voting method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the voting method */,
  "voting_method_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the voting method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration record */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the registration occurred */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of the registration */,
  "registration_count" INTEGER /* Number of voters registered */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Status of the voter registration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unique identifier for each voter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election */,
  "election_status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., upcoming, in progress, completed) */,
  "election_official_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the official responsible for the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ballots_cast" (
  "ballot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ballot cast record */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the ballots were cast */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election for which ballots were cast */,
  "voting_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the method of voting used */,
  "ballots_cast" INTEGER /* Number of ballots cast */,
  "ballot_type" TEXT /* Type of ballot (e.g., paper, electronic) */,
  "ballot_status" TEXT /* Status of the ballot (e.g., submitted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ballot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_cast_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_cast_voting_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("voting_method_id") REFERENCES voting_methods ("voting_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_cast_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election in which the candidate is running */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate */,
  "candidate_party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "candidate_contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate who received the votes */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the votes were cast */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election for which votes were cast */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., in-person, absentee) */,
  "vote_status" TEXT /* Status of the vote (e.g., counted, uncounted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_votes_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_votes_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., voter, poll worker, admin) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., voter, poll worker, administrator) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user (e.g., view-only, edit) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the user's access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnout record */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the turnout data applies */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election for which turnout data applies */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters */,
  "voters_turned_out" INTEGER /* Number of voters who turned out to vote */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "turnout_total" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who turned out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election for which the results apply */,
  "winning_candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the winning candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the winning candidate */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the election results (e.g., preliminary, final) */,
  "result_total" INTEGER /* Total number of votes counted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_winning_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("winning_candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_demographics" (
  "demographics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographics record */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the demographic data applies */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the voters */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the voters */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the voters */,
  "demographics_source" TEXT /* Source of the demographic data */,
  "demographics_date" TEXT /* Date when the demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_demographics_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue or proposition */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election where the issue appears on the ballot */,
  "issue_name" TEXT /* Name of the issue or proposition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue or proposition */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the issue or proposition (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "issue_category" TEXT /* Category of the issue (e.g., proposition, referendum) */,
  "issue_description_detail" TEXT /* Detailed description of the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_issues_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)
